languages.text: "Знания древних неоспоримы! Сценарий добровольной передачи Чудотворного Реактора Синтеза в нашу обитель признан наименее трудозатратным, а вероятность сохранения его полезности в наших руках близка к единице! Последствия других исходов расцениваются как нежелательные".

"The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."
languages.original_text: "Знания древних неоспоримы! Сценарий добровольной передачи Чудотворного Реактора Синтеза в нашу обитель признан наименее трудозатратным, а вероятность сохранения его полезности в наших руках близка к единице! Последствия других исходов расцениваются как нежелательные".

traits.locale_text: "The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."

"The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."

"The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."

languages.text: 「古代の知恵は否定できない！奇跡の融合炉を自発的に我々の修道院に移すシナリオは、最も労力を要しないものとして認められ、我々の手にその有用性を維持する確率はほぼ1に近づく！他の結果の帰結は望ましくないものと判断された」
languages.original_text: "The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: 「古代の知恵は否定できない！奇跡の融合炉を自発的に我々の修道院に移すシナリオは、最も労力を要しないものとして認められ、我々の手にその有用性を維持する確率はほぼ1に近づく！他の結果の帰結は望ましくないものと判断された。」

languages.text: «¡El conocimiento de los antiguos es innegable! El escenario de transferencia voluntaria del Reactor de Fusión Milagroso a nuestro claustro queda reconocido como el que menos esfuerzo requiere, ¡y la probabilidad de que conservemos su utilidad tiende a uno! Las consecuencias de los otros resultados se consideran indeseables».
languages.original_text: "The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: «¡El conocimiento de los antiguos es innegable! El escenario de transferencia voluntaria del Reactor de Fusión Milagroso a nuestro claustro queda reconocido como el que menos esfuerzo requiere, ¡y la probabilidad de que conservemos su utilidad tiende a uno! Las consecuencias de los otros resultados se consideran indeseables».

languages.text: "Das Wissen der Altvorderen ist unbestreitbar! Das Szenario eines freiwilligen Transfers des wundersamen Fusionsreaktors zu unserem Kloster wird als am wenigsten arbeitsintensiv bewertet, und die Wahrscheinlichkeit der Wahrung seiner Nützlichkeit in unseren Händen geht gegen 1! Die Konsequenzen anderer Ergebnisse werden als nicht wünschenswert bewertet."
languages.original_text: "The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: "Das Wissen der Altvorderen ist unbestreitbar! Das Szenario eines freiwilligen Transfers des wundersamen Fusionsreaktors zu unserem Kloster wird als am wenigsten arbeitsintensiv bewertet, und die Wahrscheinlichkeit der Wahrung seiner Nützlichkeit in unseren Händen geht gegen 1! Die Konsequenzen anderer Ergebnisse werden als nicht wünschenswert bewertet."

languages.text: « La connaissance des anciens est indiscutable ! Le scénario d'un transfert volontaire du réacteur à fusion miraculeux dans notre cloître est assurément le moins laborieux et a le mérite d'augmenter drastiquement la probabilité de préserver son utilité ! Les conséquences des autres solutions sont considérées comme peu désirables. »
languages.original_text: "The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: « La connaissance des anciens est indiscutable ! Le scénario d'un transfert volontaire du réacteur à fusion miraculeux dans notre cloître est assurément le moins laborieux et a le mérite d'augmenter drastiquement la probabilité de préserver son utilité ! Les conséquences des autres solutions sont considérées comme peu désirables. »

languages.text: “古圣知识不容置疑！将神赐聚变反应堆自愿移交至我方修道院的方案，已被判定为人力消耗最低，同时，其在我方手中保持效用的概率趋近于一！其他结果的潜在影响已被判定为不可取。”
languages.original_text: "The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."

traits.locale_text: “古圣知识不容置疑！将神赐聚变反应堆自愿移交至我方修道院的方案，已被判定为人力消耗最低，同时，其在我方手中保持效用的概率趋近于一！其他结果的潜在影响已被判定为不可取。”

languages.text: "Kadimlerin irfanı inkâr edilemez! Mucizevi Füzyon Reaktörü'nün manastırımıza gönüllü olarak devredilmesi senaryosu, en az emek gerektiren senaryo olarak tanınmıştır ve kullanışlılığının ellerimizde korunma olasılığı bire yaklaşmaktadır! Diğer sonuçların doğuracağı neticeler, nahoş olarak kabul edilmektedir."
languages.original_text: "The knowledge of the ancients is undeniable! The scenario of voluntary transfer of the Miraculous Fusion Reactor to our cloister is recognised as the least labour-intensive, and the probability of preserving its usefulness in our hands approaches one! The consequences of other outcomes are deemed undesirable."

Diğer sonuçların doğuracağı neticeler, nahoş olarak kabul edilmektedir."
